item.title: Bada Boom Fireworks Recalls Pyro Diablo "Diablo Rising" Fireworks Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Explosion and Burn Hazards; Violate Fireworks Ban
item.company: Bada Boom Fireworks locations in Pennsylvania from March 2026 through May 2026 for about $45.
item.brand: Bada Boom Fireworks locations in Pennsylvania from March 2026 through May 2026 for about $45.
item.summary: This recall involves Pyro Diablo branded "Diablo Rising" 9 Shots fireworks device, model PD-C5001. The packaging displays an orange dragon on a blue and purple background. The brand name, product name, item number and warning labels are located on the top and front of the package.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Pyro Diablo "Diablo Rising" 9 Shots.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled fireworks devices immediately and contact Bada Boom Fireworks for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to return the fireworks device to Bada Boom Fireworks retail locations.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
